
  // Type_msgblock
  public class Type_msgblock {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var type_struct : Vx_Core.Type_struct = Vx_Core.e_struct
    var p_msgs : Vx_Core.Type_msglist = Vx_Core.e_msglist
    var p_msgblocks : Vx_Core.Type_msgblocklist = Vx_Core.e_msgblocklist
  }
  // Generic_msgblock_any
  public class Generic_msgblock_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_msgblock = e_msgblock
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_msgblock_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_struct
    override public func p_type_struct() -> Vx_Core.Type_struct {
      return self.backref.type_struct
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_msgblock
    }
  }
  // Generic_msgblock_struct
  public class Generic_msgblock_struct : Vx_Core.Generic_struct {
    var backref : Type_msgblock = e_msgblock
  }
  // Generic_msgblock_type
  public class Generic_msgblock_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_msgblock = v_msgblock_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_msgblock = v_msgblock_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_msgblock = v_msgblock_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = f_msgblock(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_msgblock_constructor
  public static func v_msgblock_constructor(
  ) -> Type_msgblock {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_msgblock()
  }
  // v_msgblock_create
  public static func v_msgblock_create(
  ) -> Type_msgblock {
    var output : Type_msgblock = v_msgblock_constructor()
    v_msgblock_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_msgblock_register
  public static func v_msgblock_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_msgblock_startup_type()
    v_msgblock_startup_empty()
    return t_msgblock
  }
  // v_msgblock_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_msgblock_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_msgblock
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_msgblock_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.type_struct = Vx_Core.e_struct
    let p_msgs : Vx_Core.Type_msglist = value.p_msgs
    let p_msgblocks : Vx_Core.Type_msgblocklist = value.p_msgblocks
    value.p_msgs = Vx_Core.e_msglist
    value.p_msgblocks = Vx_Core.e_msgblocklist
    Vx_Core.v_release_listany(
      [
        p_msgs.type_any,
        p_msgblocks.type_any
      ]
    )
  }
  // v_msgblock_startup - mutating
  public static func v_msgblock_startup(
    _ value : Type_msgblock
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_msgblock_any = Generic_msgblock_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_msgblock,
      generic_any
    )
    let generic_struct : Generic_msgblock_struct = Generic_msgblock_struct()
    value.type_struct = Vx_Core.v_struct_new_from_any_generic_struct(
      value.type_any,
      generic_struct
    )
  }
  // v_msgblock_startup_empty
  public static func v_msgblock_startup_empty() {
    v_msgblock_startup(e_msgblock)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_msgblock,
      e_msgblock.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_msgblock_startup_type
  public static func v_msgblock_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_msgblock
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/msgblock")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_struct
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_msgblock_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_msgblock
  public static func v_any_from_msgblock(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_msgblock_from_any
  public static func v_msgblock_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msgblock {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.e_msgblock
    if let generic_any : Generic_msgblock_any = type_any.generic_any {
      output = generic_any.backref
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_msgblock_copy
  public static func v_msgblock_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msgblock {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = copyval
    Vx_Core.v_reserve_listany(
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    let orig_anymap : Vx_Core.Type_anymap = Vx_Core.v_anymap_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    let maptype : [String : Vx_Core.Type_type] = [
      "msgs" : Vx_Core.t_msglist,
      "msgblocks" : Vx_Core.t_msgblocklist
    ]
    let merged_anymap : Vx_Core.Type_anymap = Vx_Core.v_anymap_from_maptype_anymap_anylist(
      maptype,
      orig_anymap,
      anylist
    )
    let msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      merged_anymap.type_any
    )
    var ischanged : Bool = false
    if msgblock !== Vx_Core.e_msgblock {
      ischanged = true
    }
    if !ischanged {
      ischanged = Vx_Core.v_booleann_issame_from_anymap_anymap(
        orig_anymap,
        merged_anymap
      )
    }
    if ischanged {
      let type_delta : Vx_Core.Type_delta = Vx_Core.v_delta_from_any(
        merged_anymap.type_any
      )
      let p_msgs_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "msgs"
      )
      var p_msgs : Vx_Core.Type_msglist = Vx_Core.v_msglist_from_any(
        p_msgs_any
      )
      let p_msgblocks_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "msgblocks"
      )
      var p_msgblocks : Vx_Core.Type_msgblocklist = Vx_Core.v_msgblocklist_from_any(
        p_msgblocks_any
      )
      if msgblock !== Vx_Core.e_msgblock {
        let msgblocks : Vx_Core.Type_msgblocklist = Vx_Core.f_msgblocklist(
          Vx_Core.f_anylist(
            p_msgblocks_any,
            msgblock.type_any
          )
        )
        p_msgs = msgblock.p_msgs
        p_msgblocks = msgblocks
      }
      output = v_msgblock_create()
      if p_msgs !== copyval.p_msgs {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_msgs.type_any)
        output.p_msgs = p_msgs
      }
      if p_msgblocks !== copyval.p_msgblocks {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_msgblocks.type_any)
        output.p_msgblocks = p_msgblocks
      }
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_delta(type_delta)
      output.type_any.type_delta = type_delta
    }
    Vx_Core.v_release_except_listany(
      output.type_any,
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any,
        merged_anymap.type_any
      ]
    )
    return output
  }
  // f_msgblock
  public static func f_msgblock(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msgblock {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = v_msgblock_copy(e_msgblock, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_msgblock : Type_msgblock = v_msgblock_constructor()
